spec_text:
See full Confluence page at https://confluence.se.com/spaces/PIC/pages/679587201/Requirements+replacement (version 35).

Existing Jira tickets: PIC-9841 (Feature), PIC-10185 (User Story - Backoffice UI fields), PIC-10186 (User Story - In question).

Backoffice:
1. Adding replaced requirements data from UI - 'Replacing' and 'Is Replaced By' multi-select fields on Add/Edit Requirement screens (likely covered by PIC-10185).
2. Updating requirements that were replacing other requirements - version classification (Minor/Major) when updating requirements with 'Replacing' field filled.
3. File export/template: new 'Replacing' and 'Is Replaced By' columns in Product and Process Requirements export files; 'Replacing' column in template files; upload validation.

Frontoffice:
4. Requirements Update pop-up - warning messages (4 variants based on release creation/stage/unanswered Qs), pop-up with filters, table with Change/Requirement Name/Description/Details columns, grouped by unique replacing requirements sets.
5. View details of changes - 4 detail pop-up types: Added (code+name+stamp+description), Removed (+ status/evidence/justification/delegation), Updated (2-column old/new with green highlights), Replaced (header 'Replaced: N→M', 2-column with scrollable lists).
6. Actions on Requirements Update pop-up - Product Requirements: checkbox selection, auto-select sub-reqs, 'Apply Selected Changes' logic (with/without Update Requirements Status page), 'Keep Current Version', delegation/Jama/Jira transfer rules.
7. Actions on Requirements Update pop-up - Process Requirements: 'Yes, change the version' / 'Keep Current Version' buttons, same logic as Product Requirements.
8. Update Requirements Status page - view: table grouped by New Requirement, columns (checkbox, Old Req, Old Status, New Req, New Status, Actions), default status transfer rules, bulk actions (Edit, Transfer Requirement Statuses).
9. Edit status on Update Requirements Status page - individual Edit pop-up (left: old details, right: new editable fields), bulk Edit Selected Requirements pop-up (collapsible sections, sticky bottom), mandatory fields per status.
10. Actions on Update Requirements Status page - Back navigation (statuses persist), Transfer Requirement Statuses (confirm pop-up, 1:1 vs many:1 logic), Save Changes (final update logic), Cancel/X.
11. Latest version not added after risk/questionnaire update - 4 behavioral cases; 'main use cases' table (New product, Existing product no releases, Existing active releases - Scoping/R&C/Manage).
12. Already updated requirements pop-up - blue info message 'The latest version of the requirements has been applied in this release. Learn More', view-only pop-up (no checkboxes, no Apply button).
13. Impact of requirements update for not-scoped requirements.
14. Update questionnaire behavior - warning on Questionnaire tab and Requirements tabs when unanswered Qs exist; editing Q during R&C and Manage adds Key Decision Topic; red flag icon on edited questions.
15. Tableau reports - Product/Process Requirements 'actual on Date' reports: filter changed to show requirements by release ID.
example_stories_text: PIC-10185 covers Backoffice UI fields (Replacing / Is Replaced By). PIC-10186 is In Question.
